use_cases: Real-time chat interfaces for team collaboration tools
Customer support messaging widgets embedded in web applications
Direct messaging features in social and community platforms
In-app messaging for e-commerce buyer-seller communication
ai_summary: A messaging conversation UI component featuring user avatars with presence status badges (online/dnd/offline), a scrollable message thread with timestamped bubbles, and hover-reveal action menus for copy, reply, flag, and delete operations. Built using shadcn/ui primitives including Card, Avatar, DropdownMenu, and ScrollArea for a clean, accessible messaging interface suitable for SaaS applications, social platforms, and customer support tools.
